name: EduLearn
description: EduLearn is a premier online education platform offering expert-led courses in technology, business, design, and more. Start learning today and transform your career.

hero.headline: Learn Without Limits
hero.subheadline: Access 500+ expert-led courses in tech, business, design & more. Join 50,000+ learners transforming their careers.

heroSlides.headline: Learn Without Limits
heroSlides.subheadline: Access 500+ expert-led courses in tech, business, design & more. Join 50,000+ learners transforming their careers.

heroSlides.headline: Speak German with Confidence
heroSlides.subheadline: Join our structured German language classes from A1 to B2. Small groups, expert teachers, and proven methods.

heroSlides.headline: Certify Your Skills
heroSlides.subheadline: Earn industry-recognised certificates that employers value. Build your portfolio and land your dream job.

features.title: HD Video Lessons
features.description: Crystal-clear video content from world-class instructors at your own pace.

features.title: Industry Certificates
features.description: Earn recognized certificates that boost your resume and career prospects.

features.title: Vibrant Community
features.description: Connect with peers and mentors in a collaborative learning environment.

features.title: Lifetime Access
features.description: Buy once, learn forever. All courses come with lifetime access and updates.

germanFAQs.a: Click "View & Register" on any class, fill in the registration form, and you will receive a confirmation email within 24 hours.
We keep classes small — maximum 12 students — to ensure each student gets personal attention and speaking practice.

germanFAQs.q: Is online the same quality as in-person?
germanFAQs.a: Yes. Our online classes use Zoom with breakout rooms for pair work, digital whiteboards, and the same curriculum as in-person sessions.
Yes. If you find the level too easy or too difficult after the first session, we will help you move to the right class free of charge.
All course materials — workbooks, audio files, and digital resources — are included in the course price.

germanFAQs.q: Do you prepare students for Goethe exams?
germanFAQs.a: Our B1 and above courses specifically prepare students for Goethe-Institut certificate exams with mock tests and exam strategies.

story.title: Our Story
story.p1: EduLearn was founded in 2020 with a simple but powerful belief: that access to quality education shouldn't be limited by geography, socioeconomic status, or time.
story.p2: Starting with just 10 courses and a handful of dedicated instructors, we've grown into a thriving community of 50,000+ learners and 200+ world-class educators.
story.p3: Today, EduLearn students have landed jobs at top companies, launched successful businesses, and transformed their careers. That's what drives us every day.

values.title: Accessibility
values.description: Education should be available to everyone, everywhere.

values.title: Excellence
values.description: We hold ourselves to the highest standards in content quality.

values.title: Community
values.description: Learning is better together. We foster connection and collaboration.

values.title: Innovation
values.description: We embrace new technologies to make learning more effective.

aboutSection.contactDesc: Have questions? We'd love to hear from you.

seo.defaultDescription: EduLearn offers 500+ expert-led online courses in technology, business, design and more. Start learning today with lifetime access.
